Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (volunteer firefighting and search and rescue volunteer services)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (volunteer firefighting and search and rescue volunteer services)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends subsections 118.06(2) and 118.07(2) of the Income Tax Act in order to increase the amount of the tax credits for volunteer firefighting and search and rescue volunteer services from $3,000 to $10,000.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The portion of subsection 118.06(2) of the Income Tax Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: For the purpose of computing the tax payable under this Part for a taxation year by an individual who performs eligible volunteer firefighting services in the year, there may be deducted the amount determined by multiplying $10,000 by the appropriate percentage for the taxation year if the individual

Section.Text: The portion of subsection 118.07(2) of the Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:

Subsection.MarginalNote: Search and rescue volunteer tax credit
Subsection.Text: For the purpose of computing the tax payable under this Part for a taxation year by an individual who performs eligible search and rescue volunteer services in the year, there may be deducted the amount determined by multiplying $10,000 by the appropriate percentage for the taxation year if the individual

Section.Text: Sections 1 and 2 apply to the 2021 and subsequent taxation years.
